workplan: Ingest business data, search live web for competitors and trends, extract anomalies.
reasoning: Data ke mutabiq, Sapphire ke liye kuch aham maslay aur mauqay hain. Unstitched lawn ki sales April mein bohot achi rahi hain, jo garmiyon ke mausam ka aik mazboot trend dikhati hain. Lekin, Sapphire Beauty ki demand ke bawajood sales kam hain, jo stock ya supply chain ke maslon ki taraf ishara karta hai. Online checkout mein maslay aur international shipping charges ki shikayatain bhi bohot aham hain. Muqablay walay brands discounts aur free delivery jaisi offers de rahe hain, jis se Sapphire par qeematon ka dabao barh raha hai. Tier-2 shehron mein demand hai lekin stock ki kami hai. Social media par engagement achi hai, khaas kar pastel aur floral designs par, lekin kapray mein kharabi ki shikayat bhi aayi hai. Live trend batata hai ke garmi ka mausam shuru ho chuka hai aur log halke kapray talash kar rahe hain.
decision: Sapphire ko sab se pehlay online checkout ke maslay aur international shipping charges ko theek karna chahiye taake online sales behtar hon. Sapphire Beauty ke sold-out items ka stock jaldi se jaldi dobara lana chahiye. Unstitched lawn ki quality control ko mazeed behtar banana chahiye. Tier-2 shehron mein stock ki replenishment ko tez karna chahiye. Muqablay walon ki offers ko dekhtay hue apni pricing strategy aur delivery options par gaur karna chahiye. Garmi ke mausam ke trend ko dekhtay hue, halke phulke kapron aur summer collections ki marketing ko mazeed mazboot karna chahiye, khaas kar un designs ko jin par social media par achi engagement hai.
output_summary: Found insights and integrated live trends.

workplan: Generate action chain, verify budget constraints, and predict ROI.
reasoning: SAPPHIRE ke liye summer demand and competitive pressure ko tackle karne ke liye dynamic promotional strategies aur direct local marketing key steps hain.
decision: Proposed highly custom actionable strategy covering specific challenges for SAPPHIRE.
